mano_cua.result_summary: 窄屏（300px）下外部链接箭头图标↗与链接文本被拆分到不同行：example link 在第1行末尾，↗跑到第2行开头。400px宽度下正常（链接和箭头同行）。Bug已确认复现
mano_cua.last_reasoning: At narrow viewport widths (e.g., 300px), the external link arrow icon ↗ in the Lumen note editor is being separated from the associated link text onto a different line. At 300px viewport: Line 1 ends with 'some long text here example link' (link text underlined), Line 2 starts with '↗ (some note) more text' (arrow icon at beginning of line 2). The link text and its arrow icon should wrap as a unit but they are being split onto different lines. At 400px viewport width: correct behavior (both on same line). Confirmed bug.
